# GYEON Q²M Leather Cleaner Natural

Brand: Gyeon
Regular price: $22.00 CAD
Sizes: 500ml - $22.00 CAD | 1L - $34.00 CAD
Barcodes: 500ml: 8809432677802 | 1L: 8809432677819

Images:
- //carzilla.ca/cdn/shop/files/GYEON-Q2M-Leather-Cleaner-Natural-500ml.webp
- //carzilla.ca/cdn/shop/files/GYEON-Q2M-Leather-Cleaner-Natural-1L.webp
- //carzilla.ca/cdn/shop/files/gyeon-leather-cleaner-mild-1.jpg
- //carzilla.ca/cdn/shop/files/gyeon-leather-cleaner-mild.jpg
- //carzilla.ca/cdn/shop/files/gyeon-leather-cleaner-banner.jpg
- //carzilla.ca/cdn/shop/files/gyeon-leather-cleaner-mild-banner.jpg

## Won't strip protectants and coatings

Q²M LeatherCleaner Mild is the ideal solution for daily maintenance and pre-coating preparation of leather upholstery. Free from softening additives, it ensures a residue-free cleaning that won't compromise the performance of a quality ceramic coating. Q²M LeatherCleaner Mild imparts a fully matte finish and is compatible with all contemporary leather types. It can be safely applied to coated leather, preserving the coating while gently cleansing the surface.

## Safe Cleaning

Q²M LeatherCleaner Mild is a gentle yet highly effective pre-coating leather cleaner. Formulated in collaboration with Gyeon's premium Q² LeatherShield, it stands as the ultimate leather preparation product for use before applying a coating. This cleaner effectively eliminates light dirt, oily residue, and even light discoloration. Notably, the formula excludes softening or preserving additives, ensuring a surface that is fully prepared for coating.

## Works on vinyl and plastics

Start by vacuuming the upholstery. Mix Q²M LeatherCleaner Mild with water to increase foam and aid in distributing the cleaner. Apply the solution using the Q²M LeatherBrush, working in sections.
TIP: Remove dirt with a microfiber in a straight motion. Utilize at least three towels: one for the initial wipe, a damp one to remove suds, and another one to dry the surface.

## Description

### MILD LEATHER CLEANER DEDICATED FOR SEMI-ANILINE AND NAPPA LEATHER

Q²M LeatherCleaner Natural is a safe, pH-neutral cleaner designed for all types of modern automotive leather. Specifically crafted for delicate nappa and semi-aniline upholstery in luxury and sports cars, it is equally suitable for any other modern leather upholstery. This ultimate leather preparation product is developed in tandem with Gyeon's high-end Q² LeatherShield EVO & Q² LeatherCoat redefined. It effectively eliminates light dirt, oily residue, and even mild discoloration. Unlike most leather cleaners, the formula excludes softening or preserving additives, leaving a surface primed for coating.

GENTLE CLEAN FOR ANY TYPE OF LEATHER: Q²M LeatherCleaner Natural is the ideal solution for daily maintenance and pre-coating preparation of leather upholstery. Free from softening additives, it leaves no residue that might compromise the quality of a ceramic coating. Providing a fully matte finish, it is suitable for all modern types of leather, including coated leather, without affecting the coating.

BEST PRACTICE AND PRO-TIPS FROM YVES HEYLEN: Begin by vacuuming the upholstery. Utilize Q²M LeatherCleaner Natural with water to enhance foam and facilitate even distribution of the cleaner. Employ the Q²M ScrubPad EVO, working in sections. TIP: Remove dirt with a microfiber cloth in a straight motion. Use at least three towels: one for the initial wipe, a damp one to eliminate suds, and another to dry the surface.

CONSUMPTION: 60~100ml/car

## FAQ

Q: Does it work on aniline and semi-aniline leather?
A: Leather Cleaner Mild & Strong only works with 'finished' or coated automotive leather. Do not use on Aniline un-coated leather or semi aniline leather. Use GYEON LeatherCleaner Natural instead, this one's safe on aniline and semi-aniline.

Q: Will it remove dye transfer?
A: Yes and no. It depends on how long the dye has been on the leather. Leather is fairly porous, and dye can migrate into the material, making it challenging to remove. If caught within a few days, Leather Cleaner Strong can potentially remove it. However, if the dye is etched into the leather, redyeing the finish may be necessary.

Q: Is it shiny?
A: No, both Leather Cleaner Strong and Mild will yield a matte finish.

Q: What else can I clean with it?
A: Not limited to leather, it can also clean plastics, vinyl, vegan leather, dashboards, and trim.

Q: Does it lather?
A: Yes, it will lather when agitated with a brush and works in a foaming bottle as well.

Q: What's the difference between Mild and Strong?
A: Mild is excellent for maintenance, while Strong can effectively remove leather protection products for a full strip and deep clean.

# GYEON - Q²M Leather Cleaner Natural

Brand: GYEON
GYEON Q² Leather Cleaner Neutral is a gentle, residue-free leather cleaner designed to remove dirt and oils safely. Prepares leather for coating without drying or damaging the surface.

Price: From £13.50 (Ex VAT: £11.25)
Sizes:
- 500ml - £13.50 inc. vat (Stock: 20+)
- 1L - £21.00 inc. vat (Stock: 20+)

Images:
- image/cache/wp/gj/product/Gyeon/leather-cleaner/gyeon-leather-cleaner-neutrala-756x698h.webp
- image/cache/wp/gj/product/Gyeon/leather-cleaner/gyeon-leather-cleaner-neutral-b-756x698h.webp
- image/cache/wp/gj/product/Gyeon/leather-cleaner/gyeon-leather-cleaner-neutral-d-756x698h.webp
- image/cache/wp/gj/product/Gyeon/leather-cleaner/gyeon-leather-cleaner-neutral-c-756x698h.webp
- image/cache/wp/gj/product/Gyeon/2024/q2m-leather-cleaner-natural/gyeon-q2m-leather-cleaner-natural-500ml-756x698w.webp
- image/cache/wp/gj/product/Gyeon/2024/q2m-leather-cleaner-natural/gyeon-q2m-leather-cleaner-natural-1l-756x698w.webp

## Description

Gyeon Q2M Leather Cleaner Natural is a safe, pH-neutral cleanser for all types of modern leather. It has been designed for luxury and sports cars featuring delicate nappa and semi-aniline upholstery, but of course, it is also suitable for any type of modern leather covering.

Q2M Leather Cleaner Natural works perfectly as a cleaner but also works perfectly to prepare the leather for the application of a leather coating or protectant such as Q2 Leather Shield or Q2 Leather Coat. Q2M Leather Cleaner Natural removes light dirt, oily residues, and even light discoloration. This formula does not include any softening or preserving additives which helps to prevent the appearance from changing, as well as leaving the best base for coatings.

### Using Gyeon Q2M Leather Cleaner Natural

- Ensure the leather is clear and free of debris.
- Spray Gyeon Q2M Leather Cleaner Natural either directly onto the surface or onto a leather brush or scrub pad.
- Gently scrub the leather and wipe away any residue with a clean microfibre towel.
- Repeat if necessary.
- Once clean the leather should be restored to a matte finish and ready for coating or protecting if desired.

Sizes Available: 500ml & 1L

### Recommended Accessories:
- GYEON - Q²M Leather Brush (£6.00)
- GYEON - Q²M Leather Cleaner Strong (£12.50)
- GYEON - Q²M ScrubPad EVO (£6.50)

## Product Information

- Safely clean your leather or vinyl surfaces!
- Helps prep leather for coating applications
- Does not contain any softening or preserving additives

## Product Description

The Gyeon Leather Cleaner Natural allows you to gently remove light contamination from your leather surfaces! Dirt, grime and light oily residue is no match for this unique formula. Leather Cleaner does not contain any softening or preserving additives and is safe on all modern types of leather. There are two cleaning options, strong and natural. Strong works best on heavily soiled leather surfaces, while natural is gentler and designed for maintenance cleanings. For added cleaning power, Gyeon recommends using the Gyeon Leather Brush as well. This high-quality formula also helps prep your leather if you want to apply a leather coating like Gyeon Leather Coat afterward. If you are looking to lightly clean or maintain your leather seats the Gyeon Leather Cleaner Natural should be your choice!

Cleaning Options:
- Leather Cleaner Strong - Designed to clean heavily soiled leather areas.
- Leather Cleaner Natural - Best suited for lightly soiled leather or as a maintenance cleaner.

## From The Label

Mild and safe, pH-neutral cleaner for all types of modern automotive leather, including nappa and semi-aniline upholstery.

- Perfect for daily use
- Safe on all types of leather
- Mild cleaning action

### Directions

Vacuum upholstery before cleaning. Spray on a small area and clean with Q2M LeatherBrush or Q2M ScrubPad. Remove dirt in a straight motion. Do not rub in with the microfibre. Wipe with a lightly damp cloth to remove excess of product. KEEP OUT OF REACH OF CHILDREN.

## Customer Reviews (3 ratings, 100% would buy again)

Review by Billy S. (2/6/2022, DI Verified Purchase): "I recommend the strong formula over the mild, not enough cleaning power. But for wipe down works perfect." - Would buy again: Yes

Review by Michael B. (7/12/2021, DI Verified Purchase): "I love this product! With white vegan leather seats in my Tesla it's either trust a quality product or you're doomed as there is no forgiveness on white. This product is up to the task. I have nothing but things to say. It cleans, doesn't leave a residue, and the seats aren't slippery after use. Two big thumbs up!!" - Would buy again: Yes

Review by Nicholas C. (3/11/2019, DI Verified Purchase): "Excellent product - as effective as a Leatherique treatment at a fraction of the cost and time involved. So far I've used it on two minivans with a good bit of grime on the front seats. It's much more effective than Meguiar's APC as well; one application with a horsehair brush did as well as three applications of APC. It foams up well with brush agitation, but two wipes with a damp cloth took care of any residue. Pros: Mild scent, very effective, foams well, wipes off easily. Cons: Wish it came in gallon or 4l." - Would buy again: Yes

# Gyeon Q²M Leather Cleaner Natural (500ml & 1L)

Brand: GYEON

Images:

## Gentle Yet Powerful Leather Cleaner for Luxury Interiors!

Treat your car's nappa, semi-aniline, or modern automotive leather to the ultimate in safe, pH-neutral cleaning with GYEON Q²M LeatherCleaner Natural. Specially formulated for high-end vehicles, this residue-free cleaner removes dirt, oils, and light discoloration while perfectly prepping surfaces for ceramic leather coatings like GYEON LeatherShield EVO.

Unlike conventional leather cleaners, it contains no silicones or conditioners, leaving a pure matte finish that's ready for protection -- or perfect as a standalone gentle cleaner for coated and uncoated leather alike.

The detailer's choice for authentic, coating-ready leather -- no compromises!

## Why Choose GYEON Q²M LeatherCleaner Natural?

- Luxury-League Safe -- Designed for delicate nappa & semi-aniline leathers.
- Coating-Prep Essential -- Leaves zero residue for perfect ceramic coating adhesion.
- Restorative Yet Gentle -- Removes oils, light stains, and everyday grime without harsh chemicals.
- Universal Use -- Works on all modern automotive leather, including coated surfaces.
- Authentic Matte Finish -- No artificial shine, just factory-correct cleanliness.

## Features

- pH-Neutral Formula -- Won't dry out or damage delicate leather.
- No Silicones/Conditioners -- Ensures compatibility with GYEON leather coatings.
- Foam-Enhanced Cleaning -- Mix with water for deeper cleansing.
- Low Consumption -- Only 100mL per full interior.

## Specification

- Coverage: ~100mL per full car
- Safe For: Nappa & semi-aniline leather, Coated leather (won't strip protection), Perforated/sealed automotive leather
- Best Paired With: GYEON Q²M ScrubPad EVO (gentle agitation) & GYEON LeatherShield EVO (ceramic protection)

## How To Use

1. Vacuum First -- Remove loose debris from seats and surfaces.
2. Mix & Apply -- Combine with water, then apply with GYEON Q²M ScrubPad EVO.
3. Work in Sections -- Clean 2x2 ft areas at a time using straight motions (never circular).
4. Triple-Towel Wipe:
   - 1st Towel: Remove initial residue
   - 2nd Towel (damp): Eliminate suds
   - 3rd Towel: Dry buff for streak-free finish

Pro Tip: Before applying LeatherShield EVO, always use this cleaner for guaranteed coating adhesion. For maintenance, use monthly on coated leather.

Available Sizes: 500ml & 1 Litre

## Customer Reviews

No reviews yet.

sources.page_title: Gyeon Q2M Leather Cleaner Natural - 500ml – The Detail Store
sources.cleaned_content:
# Gyeon Q2M Leather Cleaner Natural - 500ml

Rating: 4.9 out of 5 stars (14 Reviews, 100% would recommend)
Price: $26.99 AUD (Tax included)

Images:
- //www.detailstore.com.au/cdn/shop/files/Gyeon_Q2M_Leather_Cleaner_Natural_-_500ml.jpg

## Product Description

GYEON Leather Cleaner Natural is the perfect product to use for someone who takes good care of their leather but is looking to take it up a notch. GYEON Leather Cleaner Natural is an effective but gentle leather cleaner that will rid your delicate upholstery of light dirt, oily residue, and light discoloration. Once your leather surface is prepped with GYEON Leather Cleaner Natural, it is ready for a coating to give it some lasting protection! Because GYEON Leather Cleaner Natural does not include any softening or preserving additives and leaves a matte finish, your leather will now be a perfectly clean slate for a leather coating!

Leather interior and upholstery has been a sign of luxury in the car community for almost as long as cars have been around. This beautiful material has the ability to take the value (both monetary and personal) from 0 to 60 in no seconds flat! Although leather is a wonderful material, it does have its pitfalls. If leather is not cared for properly, it can ruin the entire look of your vehicle. The best way to take care of your leather is with routine cleanings and proper protection. GYEON Leather Cleaner Natural will help you do both of these things much more easily!

GYEON Leather Cleaner Natural takes the sensitive nature of leather into account. Because leather is so easily damaged, using an aggressive cleaner to care for it can leave it looking much worse than if you had just left it alone. This is why GYEON Leather Cleaner Natural was formulated using cleaners that are not simply good at cleaning surfaces but are also gentle enough to not damage your leather in the process!

While GYEON Leather Cleaner Natural does make for a fantastic cleaner, it was designed to be followed up with a durable and lasting leather coating. GYEON Leather Cleaner Natural does not include a lot of the ingredients that have become commonplace in leather cleaners nowadays. Things such as softening and preserving additives were excluded from the formula of GYEON Leather Cleaner Natural to ensure that there would not be anything left on the surface that would hinder a coating's ability to bond.

Once you do have your leather properly coated, GYEON Leather Cleaner Natural will still give you a great way to clean your coated leather as well. GYEON Leather Cleaner Natural does not contain any harsh chemicals or other ingredients that would harm the coating you applied. So, GYEON Leather Cleaner Natural can be used as a regular maintenance cleaner to keep your leather looking and feeling great!

## Directions

Vacuum upholstery before cleaning. In the case of light contamination, spray on a microfiber and wipe gently. In the case of stronger contamination, spray on a small area and clean with a quality leather brush. Remove dirt with straight motions, do not rub it in with the microfiber.

## Customer Reviews (14 Reviews, 4.9/5 stars, 100% would recommend)

Review by Paul R. (Verified Buyer, Professional - Advanced, SA, Age 45-54): Rated 5/5 - "Gyeon leather cleaner works beautifully on all types of leather including heavily grained leather. Applied and agitated with brush it cleans thoroughly ready for Gyeon leather coat or your favourite leather protection. Highly recommended."

Review by Mick F. (Verified Buyer, Weekend Warrior - Enthusiast, VIC, Age 55-64): Rated 5/5 - "All gyeon products are excellent value and great product."

Review by Prez (Verified Buyer, Aspiring Prosumer - Intermediate, NSW, Age 18-24): Rated 5/5 - "Lathers up nicely with only 4-5 sprays, when used in conjunction with a soft bristle brush. Cleans the surface of any oils and containments, but wipes away to leave a factory finish to the material, no extra oils, smells or shine added. I use it as apart of my weekly clean on the Ford Everest Sport, which has ventilated seating. The solution dissolves and dries really well due to its foaming ability when agitated, and does not get trapped in the tiny holes of my ventilated seating. Only thing that could be better is the scent! Smells like baby wipes, which isn't a bad smell, but not as pleasing as their more citrus based scents with their other interior products. I'd highly recommend this product for anyone looking for a hassle free interior maintenance cleaner for their leather or like material interior."

Review by George M. (Verified Buyer, VIC, Age 25-34): Rated 5/5 - "Love all of the Gyeon products, so great to use and amazing results. Now a frequent buyer."

Review by Adam B. (Verified Buyer, VIC, Age 45-54): Rated 5/5 - "I used Gyeon Q2M leather cleaner on Tesla MY white upholstery and can see amazing results. The look and feel of leather stays as is, no shine added at the same time feels clean from body oils, dust. My second online order with The Detail Store and picked up next day and great experience overall."
